name: Janne
description:
Jeanne D'Arc is a swordswoman from 15th-century France. A bearer of tremendous beauty, she roamed her land in search of a strong fighter to become her husband. However, she continues her search in a different time now. She is based on Joan D'Arc or "Joan of Ark". Her name is spelled as "Janne" in the World Heroes series, but in SNK Heroines: Tag Team Frenzy, her name appears as "Jeanne".

Avatar by West Maison
creator: AMultiverseAuthor
